issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in workflows in a way that generated duplicate tasks for HAs and TCs. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding those deal stages. A tweak to the filters was made on March 9, 2026.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks that arrived after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. This was updated on March 16, 2026.
issues.workaround: For deals that fell through and went back under contract during the impact window, manually enroll them in the Offer Accepted workflow to generate the closing info collection tasks.

issues.title: MRC Offer Accepted deals not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks to collect closing information. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed a fix was applied on April 1, 2026. The root cause was not publicly disclosed.
issues.workaround: Manually send closing info collection emails and complete TC tasks for any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately February 2026 and April 1, 2026.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where Paul was shown instead of the correct LO, Julie Yocum. Luis resolved the issue on March 13, 2026.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated loan officer information.
